headline: Goldman Sachs Raises its Price Target on Teradyne (TER) to $350
summary: Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) is one of the 10 AI Stocks with Potential to Rise 1000 Percent. On April 30, 2026, Goldman Sachs raised its price target on Teradyne, Inc. (NASDAQ:TER) to $350 from $300 and maintained a Buy rating. The firm said the company delivered a strong quarter that may have been overshadowed by elevated […]

headline: Rockwell, Teradyne, Tesla see automation demand despite uncertainty
summary: The companies are reporting strong earnings growth fueled in part by data center and robotics demand. Elon Musk also teased Tesla’s Optimus as its "biggest product ever."
